overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking through rural farmland at night. The character approaches and passes a wooden farmhouse under moonlight before continuing into open grasslands with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path approaching wooden homestead

events.description: character begins walking forward from standing position

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass toward a distant farmhouse

entered.detail: two-story wooden farmhouse with lit windows and a dark roof
weathered wooden post fence running parallel to the path
small wooden shed or lean-to structure next to the main house
tall green grass covering the ground
bright full moon visible through scattered clouds
dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit rural landscape with a cowboy character walking through tall grass toward a wooden farmhouse in the distance. A wooden fence lines the left side of the path while an outbuilding sits to the right. The full moon illuminates the scene with cool blue light, and mountains are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead courtyard between main house and outbuildings

events.description: character enters the immediate vicinity of the farmhouse, passing between the main house and outbuilding
character passes the shadow cast by the farmhouse, briefly darkening the scene

agents.ego_description: character walks past the farmhouse, moving between the main house on the left and a shed on the right, heading toward open fields beyond

entered.detail: small wooden shed with a sloped roof in the field beyond the farmhouse

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the farmstead, walking between the main farmhouse on the left and an outbuilding on the right. The lit windows of the farmhouse glow warmly before the character moves past the structure into a more open area with a small shed visible ahead. The ground transitions from grass to a dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant tree clusters

events.description: character leaves the farmstead behind and enters open countryside

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through open grasslands, moving away from all structures toward the distant horizon and mountains

entered.detail: tall leafy tree standing alone in the grassland
clusters of low bushes scattered across the field

segments.scene_description: Having passed the farmstead, the character walks through expansive open grasslands under the bright moon. The terrain features rolling hills with scattered trees and bushes, while distant mountains dominate the horizon ahead. The scene emphasizes the vastness of the rural landscape with no other structures or people in sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit rural farmstead that gradually opens into a vast, empty grassland. It begins with a cowboy walking through tall grass along a wooden fence toward a distant farmhouse, all bathed in the cool blue light of a full moon. As the character enters the farmstead, the scene shifts from the open field to a narrow passage between the main house and an outbuilding, where the cool moonlight contrasts with the warm glow of lit windows. The camera then follows the character as the ground transitions from grass to a dirt path, moving past a small shed and away from the structures. Finally, the environment expands into expansive rolling hills and scattered brush, leaving the farm behind to emphasize the solitude of the landscape against a backdrop of distant mountains.
